emails.subject: NWPL point Camas, Jr
emails.body: NWPL point Camas, Jr Dave, What do you know about the NWPL meter 300 (Camas Jr.)? It makes up a fair amount of Portland area load. It's my understanding that this is industrial, possibly paper mills, but I don't have much more info yet. If this is a customer you are familiar with, let me know. Thanks, Jason

emails.subject: RE: NWPL point Camas, Jr
emails.body: RE: NWPL point Camas, Jr That's where the James River Paper Mill is I think... I'll check it out To: Fuller, Dave

emails.subject: RE: NWPL point Camas, Jr
emails.body: RE: NWPL point Camas, Jr That's where the James River Paper Mill is I think... I'll check it out To: Fuller, Dave

emails.subject: RE: NWPL point Camas, Jr
emails.body: So Camas Jr is confirmed paper mill? Do you know what is behind the Bellingham II point (290)? Bellingham/Ferndale (472) I understand is the Ferndale power plant; is this 290 point another unit? Thanks, Jason To: Wolfe, Jason
